statement: This record remains negative evidence on build 26100: the repo did not produce enough supporting proof to promote it into a normal actionable surface.
gating_reason: Archived audit trail only. Keep this out of the normal tweak surface.

links.title: Repo system research notes for kernel registry values
links.summary: The repo documents SerializeTimerExpiration = 1 and explains the behavior as personal research tied to KiSerializeTimerExpiration, including notes about 0, 1, and other values.

links.title: Current app implementation
links.summary: The provider writes SerializeTimerExpiration = 1 for the current tweak.

links.title: Nohuto's and our Ghidra decompilation - Decompiled timer-serialization gate
links.summary: Nohuto's decompiled KeInitializeTimerTable mirror and our 25H2 Ghidra exports both point at the timer-serialization gate. The repo-backed fallback pass re-opened the unresolved 140c63068 block from the earlier xref, forced a temporary function boundary, and wrote the resulting decompile plus structured evidence.json into the canonical ghidra folder.
